about.title: Junior software engineering profile focused on web development and integrations.
about.description: Final-year Software Engineering student focused on web applications, backend, APIs, data and secure development practices.
about.statement: I am Tânia Oliveira, a final-year Software Engineering student and junior developer with hands-on experience building web applications, responsive interfaces, API integrations, data preparation workflows and solutions connected to business systems. I am especially interested in web development, AI-assisted programming, backend/API integration and secure development practices, with a strong focus on structure, usability and technical quality.

items.description: Full-stack development on a web platform, collaborating on feature implementation and integration between frontend and backend logic.
Frontend development for an insurance company, focused on web interfaces, visual structure and digital experience.

coverLetter.title: A technical introduction for software teams and projects.
coverLetter.description: Base text aligned with practical experience in web development, integrations, data and business systems.
paragraphs: I am Tânia Oliveira, a final-year Software Engineering student with experience in frontend development, backend development, web applications, SaaS platforms, APIs and enterprise integrations.
I have worked on corporate websites, operational platforms, ERP/CRM connectors, marketplace synchronization and CRM data preparation workflows, always respecting business context confidentiality.
My approach is technical, organized and production-oriented: structured code, data validation, logs, GitHub/Bitbucket collaboration and attention to future maintenance.
